zh.East Hoathly, Sussex, England: 英國素可易亞斯特 霍阿利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lunsford於1420年出生在英國素可芭特爾時，他的父親John de Lunsford I51歲，母親Elizabeth Echingham47歲。他於1445年與Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough在英國素可易亞斯特 霍阿利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年5月3日在英國英格蘭素可享年31歲。

zh-hans.East Hoathly, Sussex, England: 英国素可易亞斯特 霍阿利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Lunsford于1420年出生在英国素可芭特爾时，他的父亲John de Lunsford I51岁，母亲Elizabeth Echingham47岁。他于1445年与Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough在英国素可易亞斯特 霍阿利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年5月3日在英国英格兰素可享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lunsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lundsford in East Sussex, so named from an Old English personal name Lundrǣd + Old English ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lunsford was born in 1420, in Battle, Sussex, England, his father, John de Lunsford I, was 51 and his mother, Elizabeth Echingham, was 47. He married Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough in 1445, in East Hoathly, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 May 1451, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lunsford est né en 1420, à Battle, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Lunsford I, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Echingham, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough en 1445, à East Hoathly, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1451, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Lunsford 1420 in Battle, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Lunsford I 51 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Echingham 47. Er hat 1445 in East Hoathly, Sussex, England Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Mai 1451 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lunsford è nato il nel 1420 nel Battle, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Lunsford I, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Echingham, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough nel 1445, nel East Hoathly, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1451, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Lunsfordが1420年にイギリススセックスバットルで生まれた時，父John de Lunsford Iは51歳，母Elizabeth Echinghamは47歳であった。1445年にイギリススセックスエアスト ホーアスリーでLady Elizabeth Whalesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年5月3日にイギリスイギリススセックスで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lunsford(이)가 1420년 영국 수세스 바틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Lunsford I(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Echingham(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 수세스 이스트 호슬리에서 Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lunsford nasceu em 1420, em Battle, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lunsford I, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Echingham, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough em 1445, em East Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1451, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Lunsford родился в 1420 г. в местности баттл, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Lunsford I было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Echingham, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough в 1445 г. в местности эаст хоатли, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 мая 1451 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Lunsford nació en 1420, en Battle, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Lunsford I, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Echingham, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough en 1445, en East Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1451, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
